title: Just another Conveyor Addon
description: Addon for Immersive Engineering, that adds 2 more speedier conveyor types.
body:
FEATURES:

This mod adds 2 additional conveyors to Immersive Engineering.

 
HOW THESE FEATURES AFFECT A USER'S EXPERIENCE:

These conveyors are 1.5 times and 2 times faster than the original conveyor, so you can transport items 1.5 times and 2 times faster. (duh.)

Immersive Engineering must be installed to enable those conveyors!

There are no configs to increase or decrease the speed.
